ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "transferring_registry" INTEGER /* Registry from which the allowances are transferred */,
  "transferring_account_type" INTEGER /* Type of account from which the allowances are transferred */,
  "transferring_account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account from which the allowances are transferred */,
  "transferring_account_identifier" INTEGER /* Identifier of the account from which the allowances are transferred */,
  "transferring_account_holder" TEXT /* Holder of the account from which the allowances are transferred */,
  "acquiring_registry" INTEGER /* Registry to which the allowances are acquired */,
  "acquiring_account_type" INTEGER /* Type of account to which the allowances are acquired */,
  "acquiring_account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account to which the allowances are acquired */,
  "acquiring_account_identifier" INTEGER /* Identifier of the account to which the allowances are acquired */,
  "acquiring_account_holder" TEXT /* Holder of the account to which the allowances are acquired */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Number of carbon units transferred in the transaction */,
  "transaction_value" TEXT /* Monetary value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the transaction value is denominated */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the counterparty involved in the transaction */,
  "legal_document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal document associated with the transaction */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* A log of all actions and changes related to the transaction for audit purposes */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the transaction */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* The user who last updated the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "option" INTEGER /* Additional options or details related to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transferring_registry FOREIGN KEY ("transferring_registry") REFERENCES registries ("registry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_acquiring_account_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("acquiring_account_identifier") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_option FOREIGN KEY ("option") REFERENCES transaction_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_acquiring_registry FOREIGN KEY ("acquiring_registry") REFERENCES registries ("registry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_legal_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("legal_document_id") REFERENCES legal_documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transferring_account_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("transferring_account_identifier") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_counterparty_id FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty_id") REFERENCES counterparties ("counterparty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transferring_account_type FOREIGN KEY ("transferring_account_type") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_acquiring_account_type FOREIGN KEY ("acquiring_account_type") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registries" (
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registry */,
  "registry_name" TEXT /* Name of the carbon registry */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the registry is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the registry */,
  "registry_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the registry for identification */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* The regulatory body overseeing the registry */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the registry */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the registry */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the registry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "is Tradable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the account type is tradable */,
  "is Restricted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the account type is restricted */,
  "minimum_balance" INTEGER /* Minimum balance required for the account type */,
  "maximum_balance" INTEGER /* Maximum balance allowed for the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_holder" TEXT /* Holder of the account */,
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registry where the account is located */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended, closed) */,
  "balance" INTEGER /* Current balance of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "option_description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  "option_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the option */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the option is required for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counterparties" (
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counterparty */,
  "counterparty_name" TEXT /* Name of the counterparty */,
  "counterparty_type" TEXT /* Type of the counterparty (e.g., government, corporation, individual) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the counterparty */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the counterparty */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the counterparty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the counterparty was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the counterparty was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counterparty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal document */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the legal document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the legal document (e.g., contract, agreement) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL where the legal document is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the legal document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the legal document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)
